sizing_rule.note: Calculate optimal f from adjusted distribution of past trades repriced at current market levels (not raw historical P&L) to obtain more realistic proxy of potential outcomes. Adjustment accounts for chronology and equalizes past longs/shorts at current prices before optimal f derivation.

source_rule_text: Calculate optimal f from an adjusted distribution of trade profits and losses that equalizes the stream of past longs and shorts at current market prices, rather than using unadjusted historical trades, to obtain a more realistic proxy of potential trade outcomes.
